stories.title: Vitest Workspace + srs-engine Package Scaffold
stories.summary: Scaffolded packages/srs-engine (ESM package, tsconfig, Vitest workspace + package config, test setup/directories, README) and corrected three DS01 spec gaps (dependency version protocol, tsconfig include, Vitest no-test exit code).

stories.title: pnpm Workspace + Turborepo
stories.summary: Established pnpm workspace and Turborepo build orchestration at the repo root.

stories.title: Root tsconfig + ESLint flat config
stories.summary: Created the shared TypeScript base config and ESLint 9 flat config for the monorepo.

stories.title: Two-Axis Knowledge Architecture
stories.summary: Implemented two-axis knowledge compaction (time archive + domain KNOWLEDGE.md); specified AGN rollup lifecycle (plan→artifact+archive entry); tools (domains-from-diff, archive-append, archive-check) and archive-epic skill.
